title: Araldite® Rapid 15ml x 2 Tubes Epoxy
features: FAST SETTING EPOXY RESIN GLUE; A solvent-free epoxy resin and hardener that acts as a quickset glue, ideal for durable bonding and repairs; Perfect for your ceramic repair kit, craft resin kits, or any complicated jobs requiring adjustments

MULTI-SURFACE RESIN EPOXY; Made to create the strongest of bonds, this quickset epoxy glue is suitable for most materials including metal, wood, masonry, ceramics, glass, dry concrete, chipboard, leather, cardboard, fabric, rubber and most plastics

TOUGH EPOXY ADHESIVE GLUE; This 2 part epoxy resin kit creates a durable bond with rapid glue that can withstand high temperatures (-30°C to 65°C), rough handling, and can be sanded & painted after 2 hours; Do not use as rear view mirror adhesive

EASY TO USE; Clean and dry both surfaces, thoroughly mix equal parts of the 2 part epoxy glue for 30 seconds, apply to both surfaces, and apply light pressure; Remove excess adhesive once partially set; For optimal bonding, slightly roughen surface
Store the superglue resin set of 2 tubes in a dry place at room temperature

specifications_table.Compatible Material: Metal, Wood, Masonry, Ceramics, Glass, Dry Concrete, Chipboard, Leather, Cardboard, Fabric, Rubber, Plastics
